title: Foundational Bird Conservation Application
summary: A deployable application for passive avian monitoring in the field, built as a continuation of the bird species identification research. Same codebase, extended for conservation team use in Indonesia and Malaysia.
highlights: Continuation of the bird sound identification research — same repository, extended for field deployment
Wraps the BirdNET-based classification pipeline into a field-usable application
Target users: conservation officers and wildlife researchers in Borneo

title: PET/CT Tumor and Organ Segmentation
summary: Automated segmentation of tumors and organs from PET/CT scans, extending the WBBS segmentation work into full-body oncology imaging.
highlights: Targets multi-organ and tumor segmentation from combined PET/CT volumes
Builds on nnU-Net v2 experience from the WBBS bone scan pipeline
Collaboration with nuclear medicine imaging specialists

title: Computational Pathology
summary: Applying deep learning to histopathology slides for disease classification and tissue analysis. Early-stage research direction.
highlights: Whole-slide image (WSI) analysis using patch-based deep learning
Targeting cancer grading and tissue classification tasks
Research direction building on medical imaging expertise from WBBS and CXR projects

title: Diabetic Mellitus Detection from Retina Fundus Images
summary: Classification model for diabetic mellitus detection using retina fundus imaging. Best Paper at ADIKARA, School of Computing, Telkom University.
highlights: Diabetic mellitus classification from retina fundus images
Team of 3, led by M. Rifqi Dzaky Azhad

title: Bone Metastasis Diagnosis Framework
summary: Open-source bone scan diagnosis pipeline. Patient-level AUC 0.956, above EXINI and BONENAVI, both commercial systems used in clinics today.
highlights: YOLOv8 (anchor-free, CSPDarknet backbone) hotspot detection at mAP@0.5 = 0.599
nnU-Net v2 skeletal segmentation across 12 anatomical regions: IoU 0.879
XGBoost and LightGBM (AUC 0.947) at patient level; automated BSI correlated with clinical burden at r = 0.82 (p < 0.001)
Surpasses commercially deployed EXINI (0.83–0.88) and BONENAVI (0.84–0.89)
Lead Coder: 3,000-line codebase

title: Deep Learning for Bird Sound Identification
summary: 219 bird species. 17 Borneo endemics. 18 IUCN-threatened. Trained on jungle recordings, tested at Bandung Zoo and Malaysia National Zoo.
highlights: MixIT source separation + fine-tuned BirdNET v2.4; applied to 1,202 training and 115 test recordings
Endemic/endangered subset (n=115): accuracy 0.6609, macro F1 0.4193 (McNemar p < 0.05)
Full test set (n=1,335): accuracy 0.72, macro F1 0.554, weighted F1 0.724
Dataset from Xeno-canto and PBHAR with 8,840 negative samples; 72/18/10 stratified split

title: Telplastina: Multi-Task CXR Analysis Platform
summary: Five AI modules in one CXR system: classification, organ segmentation, report generation, VQA, visual grounding. Ships as both a web app and a desktop app.
highlights: Pathology classification: fine-tuned TorchXRayVision DenseNet121 on VinBig and NIH ChestX-ray14 (14-class multi-label, sigmoid), also trained DeiT-based models; input center-cropped 224x224 in XRV-native intensity range
Organ segmentation: TorchXRayVision PSPNet for right lung, left lung, and heart; square-padded, threshold 0.5, outputs binary masks, bounding boxes, and colored overlay PNG; DICOM support via pydicom
Report generation: CheXpert Plus SRRG HuggingFace models generating structured findings and impression text from CXR images
Backend: FastAPI + PostgreSQL + Redis + RQ worker + JWT auth, Docker Compose; AI inference served as microservices
Interactive ReportCard: doctor-editable findings, impressions, probability bars; canvas Grounding Editor with offscreen mask pattern for accurate brush annotation

title: VLM-Based Chest X-Ray Anomaly Explanation
summary: Grad-CAM tells you where the model looked. This system tells you what it found, in words a radiologist can actually use.
highlights: Three-module pipeline: anomaly detection (FPN + CBAM on CheXpert, MIMIC-CXR, VinDr-CXR) → BiomedCLIP visual-text alignment (15M biomedical pairs) → structured finding-location-impression report
Explanation quality evaluated directly by radiologists on a 100-case curated gold-standard subset, not only BLEU or BERTScore
Five-year roadmap toward RSNA-style external validation and integration into radiology reporting workflows

title: Driver Behaviour Analysis and Fatigue Detection System
summary: Mining fleet dashcams. Real drivers. An 11% F1 gain over the company's existing model. Running in production.
highlights: MediaPipe Holistic: 468 facial landmark coordinates extracted and temporally interpolated per frame
Multi-modal fusion model (spatial landmarks + cropped face features): test accuracy 0.85 at 10 FPS
Async cloud-review API (FastAPI, Python 3.11): HTTP 202 immediate response; background pipeline downloads, runs inference, and posts verdict to TransTrack callback with 30-minute auto-purge
Live polling runner fetches alarm events and writes verdicts to structured Excel reports via openpyxl
Full test suite covering unit, pipeline, and live integration tests against the production MDVR server
Deployed in Docker-containerised environment on RTX 4050 6 GB VRAM

title: Telplastina v1: WBBS Diagnostic Application
summary: Full-stack diagnostic application for whole-body bone scintigraphy analysis, integrating the bone segmentation, hotspot detection, and BSI quantification pipeline into a deployable clinical tool.
highlights: Integrates nnU-Net v2 segmentation and YOLOv8 hotspot detection from the funded MoHE bone scan research into a unified web application
Backend in Rust for high-performance image processing and inference serving
Frontend in Vue 3 with Docker containerisation for clinical deployment

title: Multimodal Deepfake Detection with Modality-Aware Mixture of Experts
institution: Telkom University · AI Lab Focused Group
summary: One model, two manipulation types. No label for which attack type at test time. Intra-dataset F1 0.94. Cross-dataset (unseen domains) F1 0.60 after DANN regularization.
highlights: VideoMAE (frozen, 768-dim) + Whisper (frozen, 1024-dim) encoders feed a cross-modal attention module; residuals compute audio_anomaly and visual_anomaly scores without manual labels
ModalityReliabilityGate MLP maps anomaly scores to alpha ∈ [0,1]; alpha≈0.1 routes to AudioSyncExpert, alpha≈0.85 to VisualArtifactExpert
DANN gradient-reversal on gate head prevents dataset-identity shortcuts, forcing cross-domain generalisation
223,445 segments across 5 datasets: PolyglotFake, FakeAVCeleb, HiDF, CelebDFv2, FF++
Targeting submission to ICODSA 2026

title: Retogen: Article Management Platform
summary: Full-stack web platform for publishing and moderating tech-review articles, built as a production-grade system with complete test coverage.
highlights: JWT auth with role separation (user/admin); full article lifecycle with Base64-to-Binary image upload validated by PNG/JPEG magic bytes
Hierarchical nested comments and 1–5 star ratings with MongoDB aggregation
185 automated tests covering authentication, CRUD, aggregation pipelines, and edge cases

title: Anothem: Desktop AI Storytelling Engine
summary: Local LLM desktop application for AI-assisted creative writing, designed to run entirely on consumer hardware with no cloud dependency.
highlights: Supports Qwen and custom Ouro-1.4B (recurrent, trust_remote_code) on RTX 4050 6 GB VRAM; Mistral-class models loaded at 4-bit NF4 via BitsAndBytes
Token-streamed live UI via TextIteratorStreamer; background QThread incremental summarisation keeps context within token budget across long sessions
Auto-skill classifier: keyword-scoring detects narrative intent (physical description, dialogue, scene-setting) and injects structured writing instructions per inference call

title: Real-Time AR Face Filter App
summary: Browser-based augmented reality app demonstrating live face-tracking overlays, developed to increase engagement for a local UMKM churos business.
highlights: 10 FPS on Streamlit Cloud with no local installation: Haar cascade face detection, 3 animated overlays, EMA smoothing
WebRTC peer-to-peer video via streamlit-webrtc with STUN/TURN (OpenRelay) NAT traversal; server-side per-pixel BGRA alpha compositing
Pure OpenCV replacing MediaPipe Tasks API (GPU-dependent, unavailable on Streamlit Cloud) for zero native library dependencies
